name: Fowler State Bank
description_short: Fowler State Bank is a community-focused bank offering checking, savings, online and mobile banking services with over 90 years of local presence.
description_long:
Fowler State Bank is a traditional community bank with more than 90 years of history serving customers across Benton, Warren, and Newton counties. The institution positions itself as a locally-invested financial partner dedicated to empowering the communities it serves, with active employee involvement in regional initiatives.

The bank offers standard retail banking products including deposit accounts (checking and savings), online and mobile banking platforms, and loan origination services. Customers can access accounts through a secure online portal, Apple and Android mobile apps, and in-person at multiple branch locations. Key digital features include balance viewing, fund transfers, check deposit capture, bill payment capabilities, transaction alerts via multiple channels, and financial data export for tax preparation software.

Fowler State Bank differentiates itself through genuine community engagement rather than product innovation. The bank actively participates in county fairs, collects donations for local schools and food pantries, and organizes breast cancer awareness campaigns. Its partnership with GenGold® provides members discount access to travel, groceries, restaurants, and other services. The bank also emphasizes customer education through its Product Education Center with MoneyiQ and educational videos on banking and identity theft protection.

The institution appears to be a straightforward regional community bank without specialty lending products, investment services, or premium wealth management offerings evident from the website. Customers should expect standard banking services and rates typical of community banks rather than rates or features competitive with larger national institutions or digital-first banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with balance viewing and transfer capabilities
Financial education videos and MoneyiQ resources
pros: Over 90 years of community banking history and stability
Mobile banking apps available on both iOS and Android with Touch ID login
Mobile check deposit functionality for remote account management
Customizable transaction alerts via online banking, email, or text message
Active community involvement including food pantries, school supply drives, and fair sponsorships
GenGold® membership provides discount benefits on travel, groceries, restaurants, and prescriptions
Free financial education through Product Education Center and MoneyiQ videos on banking and identity theft
cons: Limited geographic presence to three counties (Benton, Warren, Newton) restricts accessibility
No evidence of competitive rates or rate tools on public-facing website
No indication of specialty loan products, investment services, or wealth management offerings
Minimal product differentiation compared to larger regional or national banks
Website lacks transparency on fees, minimum balance requirements, or account details
best_for: Residents of Benton, Warren, or Newton counties seeking local banking relationships
Customers prioritizing community involvement and locally-invested financial institutions
Individuals wanting basic checking, savings, and straightforward loan products without complexity
diagnosis: Fowler State Bank is best suited for customers in its three-county service area who value local banking relationships and community involvement over digital innovation or rate competitiveness. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank serves only Benton, Warren, and Newton counties, making it inaccessible for customers outside this region.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
